summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a tight Fall ’79 show highlighted by a spectacular Eyes of the World and a crisp U.S. Blues encore.
review: The recording is a superb SBD mix – every instrument is defined, crisp and balanced – making the performance shine. Musically the show is solid throughout, with a tight Shakedown Street jam, an inspired second‑set featuring Eyes of the World, and Jerry Garcia adding a special twist to the U.S. Blues encore. Fans repeatedly note the energetic vocals and strong Brent‑Jerry interplay.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both the soundboard quality (crisp, defined mix) and musical performance (tight jams, standout songs), with only a single unrelated metadata complaint.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Super mix; instruments are clear and crisp, no reported drop‑outs or distortion. Reviewers describe it as “very nice sounding SBD” and “every instrument defined.”

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong first set with a tight Shakedown Street jam, followed by an especially high‑energy second set highlighted by Eyes of the World and a memorable U.S. Blues encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia shines throughout; adds a special twist to the U.S. Blues encore and delivers great interplay with Brent around the 18‑minute mark.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work is praised, especially his chemistry with Jerry during extended jams.
